title: PAST LiFE
lyrics:
​LEX「PAST LiFE」の歌詞

Lonely sunset
Without my princess
I don't know what I do without you

My past no
過去のさ俺はfucking dumb
馬鹿みたいだ　見たくもない

I said leave me alone
Depression激増
In my room 無理だ
I can not go back

I hate I hate past life
I hate past life
I hate past life

I hate past life
Everything 俺はshit
My new girl どこに行くのwait
I hate myself
